runTitle: GraphRAG variant stability recheck after ai-engine-00311 (boolean-string tool schema hotfix)
coveredSurfaces: Cloud Run /api/ai/supervisor legacy variant probe (6 attempts)
Cloud Run /api/ai/supervisor topology direct deterministic probe (3 attempts)
Cloud Run revision warning/error log inspection

expertAssessments.rationale: Hard INTERNAL_ERROR regression from schema mismatch is mitigated on ai-engine-00311. Remaining quality gap is intermittent NO_PROVIDER fallback and consistently slow latency for the legacy variant prompt.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Reduce provider-none fallback (Groq quota/rate-limit path) and bring legacy variant latency below 10s with deterministic routing or provider-order throttling strategy.

completedImprovements.title: searchKnowledgeBase boolean-string tool-call validation failure removed
completedImprovements.evidence: ai-engine-00311-lvf logs no longer show tool schema mismatch for useGraphRAG/fastMode/includeWebSearch.

pendingImprovements.title: Topology variant path still has quality/latency stabilization gap
pendingImprovements.note: After ai-engine-00311, INTERNAL_ERROR from boolean-string schema mismatch is resolved in sampled runs, but one NO_PROVIDER fallback and persistent slow latency remain on the legacy variant query.
